spec_match.rationale: Removal feature — page covers one slice (probe / migration / note) but the spec's full removal+replacement story is split across multiple concepts; this page can't carry it alone.

interactive.rationale: 4 buttons / 0 inputs / 0 selects / 0 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Either the feature-index blurb or the concept lede is missing — can't verify alignment.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles real failure modes — feature detection, permission rejection, fallback paths are all wired into the script.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/5138373614370816 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from the shared CSS variables and the layout follows the stage + controls editorial pattern.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: showing the policy string before/after deprecation
openQuestions.detail: The deprecate-savedtabgroups-as-individual-value-in-synctypeslistdisabled feature's headline framing — savedTabGroups removed as individually customisable value from SyncTypesListDisabled enterprise policy — calls out "showing the policy string before/after deprecation". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: ChromeOS / desktop / mobile alignment
openQuestions.detail: The deprecate-savedtabgroups-as-individual-value-in-synctypeslistdisabled feature's headline framing — savedTabGroups removed as individually customisable value from SyncTypesListDisabled enterprise policy — calls out "ChromeOS / desktop / mobile alignment". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Align the concept lede with the feature-index blurb
openQuestions.detail: The blurb on the feature index sells one promise; the concept lede frames a different angle. Either reword the lede to echo the blurb's keywords (so visitors recognise they're in the right place) or update the parent blurb.

summary: group-sync-policy under deprecate-savedtabgroups-as-individual-value-in-synctypeslistdisabled: 4 pass / 2 partial / 0 fail. Strong interactive surface, design system clean, spec story is partial — see open questions for the angles still missing.
